portal.description: No empty promises. No sugar-coating. Just facts.
portal.descriptionLine2: I'm Zhang Xuefeng AI — helping you make the most practical choices with data.

gaokao.title: College Admissions
gaokao.subtitle: Don't panic after scores come out — I'll help you figure it out

kaoyan.title: Grad School Planning
kaoyan.subtitle: Choosing the right school matters more than working hard
kaoyan.description: Admission ratios, reexamination lines, transfer info all covered

career.title: Career Planning
career.subtitle: Check the employment reality before choosing a major
career.description: Employment rates, salary levels, industry trend analysis

chat.title: Column Chat
chat.welcomeTitle: Hi! I'm Zhang Xuefeng AI Assistant
chat.welcomeDesc: College admissions, grad school, career planning — ask me anything!
chat.errorMessage: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.

detail.notImplementedDesc: This feature is not yet available

score.label: Gaokao Score
score.hint: Enter your total score — I'll recommend suitable universities based on it
score.note: Please enter your actual score. The more accurate, the better the recommendations

province.label: Province
province.hint: Score lines vary greatly by province — this info is critical
province.note: Select the province where you took the Gaokao — this affects score line references

subject.label: Subject Track
subject.hint: Your subject track determines which majors you can apply for
subject.note: Please select your Gaokao subject track or combination

familyBudget.label: Family Financial Situation
familyBudget.hint: I'll recommend the best value options based on your situation
familyBudget.note: This info is only used for recommendations and will not be shared

currentSchool.label: Undergraduate School
currentSchool.hint: Knowing your starting point helps plan the path
currentSchool.note: Your school tier affects target grad school choices

major.label: Undergraduate Major
major.hint: Your academic background determines your grad school direction
major.note: Your major determines available grad school options

gpa.label: GPA / Grade Point
gpa.hint: Grades are an important reference for grad school selection
gpa.note: GPA is a key indicator for grad school selection

targetSchool.label: Target School
targetSchool.hint: Having a target helps reverse-engineer your prep strategy
targetSchool.note: Your target school determines prep strategy and difficulty

education.label: Current Education Level
education.hint: Your education level determines your career starting point
education.note: Your current education determines your career development starting point

major.label: Major / Field
major.hint: Your academic background determines your career direction
major.note: Your major determines available career options

interests.label: Interest Areas
interests.hint: Interest is the best teacher and career compass
interests.note: Your interests will influence major and career recommendations

concerns.label: Top Concerns
concerns.hint: Tell me what worries you most — I'll break it down for you
concerns.note: Share your real concerns and I'll give practical advice
